about: Suggest an enhancement to the workflow

---

## Problem Statement

Describe the problem or limitation you're experiencing.

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you'd like the workflow to change.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Impact

- [ ] Changes agent behavior
- [ ] Changes article output format
- [ ] Adds new agent to the pipeline
- [ ] Changes review process
- [ ] Documentation only

## Additional Context

Add any other context, screenshots, or examples here.
